name: Joestar, Johnny

first_appearance.anime: Steel Ball Run (JoJo no Kimyou na Bouken Part 7)

abilities.name: Tusk ACT1
abilities.description: Stand takes form of stuffed doll. Can shoot infinitely spinning fingernails up to 10 meters. Nails have immense cutting power, capable of slicing through rock, cutting limbs, but cannot cut through metal.
abilities.limit: Limited to fingernails, cannot cut metal

abilities.name: Tusk ACT2
abilities.description: Fingernails rotate around fingers like axes with drilling property. Dramatically increased shot power capable of blasting large zones. Nails regrow slower.

abilities.name: Tusk ACT3
abilities.description: Bullet Hole Displacement ability. Can transfer his body through bullet holes to other locations. Any object other than himself touching bullet holes is pulverized.

abilities.name: Tusk ACT4
abilities.description: Golden Spin nail bullets with infinite rotation. Can force open dimensional walls and trap enemies. The infinite spin counteracts any ability. Damage is permanent until countered by opposite infinite spin.
abilities.limit: Requires mounted position for maximum power

abilities.name: Spin Technique
abilities.description: Mastered the Golden Rectangle Spin technique from Gyro Zeppeli. Can channel spin through his Stand for devastating effects.

abilities.name: Horse Riding
abilities.description: Former professional jockey with exceptional riding skills. Rides the horse Slow Dancer who provides additional power for Golden Spin.

character.arc: From a selfish racing prodigy left paraplegic and alone, Johnny transforms through his journey with Gyro Zeppeli, learning the Spin technique and developing his Stand Tusk to become a formidable competitor.
character.motivation: Walking again, winning the Steel Ball Run

achievements: Became one of the most powerful Spin users

notable_battles.method: Tusk ACT4 infinite spin counteracted D4C Love Train

quotes: I'm going to walk again, no matter what it takes.

story.fate: Survived Steel Ball Run, continues journey
story.awakening_potential: Full mastery of Golden Spin achieved

about:
Age: 18 (Part 2), 68 (Part 3), 78 (Part 4)
Birthday: September 27, 1920
Zodiac: Libra
Height: 195 cm (6'5")
Weight: 97 kg (214 lb)
Blood type: B
Nationality: British-American
Occupation: real estate agent
Stand: Hermit Purple

Joseph Joestar is the main protagonist of the second part of JoJo's Bizarre Adventure series, Battle Tendency, and the second JoJo of the series. He also appears as a primary ally in Stardust Crusaders (Part 3) and a secondary ally in Diamond is Unbreakable (Part 4).

Joseph is a natural-born Ripple user and eventual Stand user, wielding the psychic photographic Stand, Hermit Purple. An exuberant troublemaker with an exceptional talent for trickery, Joseph meets the fantastic threats approaching him throughout his life with initiative and impressive ingenuity, battling Vampires, the Pillar Men, and malevolent Stand users.

Stand - Hermit Purple
Ability type: Close-Range, Reconnaissance
Form type: Natural Non-Humanoid
Power: Spirit Photography

Joseph's Stand, Hermit Purple, manifests itself as a tangle of thorny vines, which Joseph can wield as both a weapon and a hazardous defense. Furthermore, it has been shown to conduct the Ripple, which makes Hermit Purple one of the more effective Stands against those weak to it such as Vampires.

One of its special abilities is to use cameras, televisions, and other things to perform a form of fortune-telling referred to as "spirit photography."

(Source: JoJo's Bizarre Encyclopedia, edited)
